zh.Wiesa, Annaberg, Chemnitz, Saxony, Germa: 德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩
zh.Chemnitz, Chemnitz, Sachsen, Germany: 德國薩辛可萊斯 姆尼次姆尼次
zh.lifeSummary: 當Michael Beyer於1596年12月25日出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩時，他的父親Georg Beyer27歲，母親Sybilla Bauer25歲。他於1619年10月18日與Christina Reichel在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1686年之前在德國。

zh-hans.Chemnitz, Chemnitz, Sachsen, Germany: 德国薩辛可萊斯 姆尼次姆尼次
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michael Beyer于1596年12月25日出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩时，他的父亲Georg Beyer27岁，母亲Sybilla Bauer25岁。他于1619年10月18日与Christina Reichel在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1686年之前在德国。

nameMeanings.name: Beyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Ewald, Klaus, Alois, Arno, Gerhard, Gunter, Heinz, Theodor.
German, Scandinavian, English, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Bayer  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.
Dutch: variant of Beijer, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Beger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Manfred.
from an agent derivative of Middle High German bāgen ‘to quarrel, to pride oneself’, hence a nickname for a quarrelsome or boastful person.

variants.name: Beyers
meanings: Dutch: variant of Beijers, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Michael Beyer was born on 25 December 1596, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, his father, Georg Beyer, was 27 and his mother, Sybilla Bauer, was 25. He married Christina Reichel on 18 October 1619, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died before 1686, in Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michael Beyer est né le 25 décembre 1596, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Georg Beyer, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sybilla Bauer, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Christina Reichel le 18 octobre 1619, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé avant 1686, à Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Michael Beyer am 25. Dezember 1596 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Georg Beyer 27 und seine Mutter Sybilla Bauer 25. Er hat am 18. Oktober 1619 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland Christina Reichel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb vor 1686 in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Beyer è nato il il 25 dicembre 1596 nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Georg Beyer, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Sybilla Bauer, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Christina Reichel il 18 ottobre 1619, nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del 1686, nel Germania.

ja.Wiesa, Annaberg, Chemnitz, Saxony, Germa: ドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサ
ja.Wiesa, Chemnitz, Sachsen, Germany: ドイツサチセンケムニッツ

ja.lifeSummary: Michael Beyerが1596年12月25日にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサで生まれた時，父Georg Beyerは27歳，母Sybilla Bauerは25歳であった。1619年10月18日にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサでChristina Reichelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1686年以前にドイツで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael Beyer(이)가 1596년 12월 25일 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Georg Beyer(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybilla Bauer(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1619년 10월 18일 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 Christina Reichel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1686년 이전 독일에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Beyer nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1596, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Georg Beyer, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sybilla Bauer, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina Reichel em 18 de outubro de 1619, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1686, em Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michael Beyer родился 25 декабря 1596 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Georg Beyer было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybilla Bauer, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina Reichel 18 октября 1619 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер перед 1686 г. в местности Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Michael Beyer nació el 25 de diciembre de 1596, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Georg Beyer, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Sybilla Bauer, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Christina Reichel el 18 de octubre de 1619, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió antes de 1686, en Alemania.
